# maniflex

> A Go framework that turns annotated structs into a complete REST API — CRUD, filtering, keyset pagination, relations, soft-delete, and a composable middleware pipeline, all derived at runtime by reflection with no code generation. Define a struct, register it, point it at a database, and get CRUD routes, query parsing, validation, an OpenAPI 3.1 spec, and relation loading for free.

Key facts for working with maniflex:

- Requires Go 1.25 or newer. Install with `go get github.com/xaleel/maniflex` plus a database adapter such as `go get github.com/xaleel/maniflex/db/sqlite`.
- Multi-module monorepo: the core depends only on `chi` and `uuid`; heavy integrations live in opt-in satellite modules (`db/postgres`, `db/sqlite`, `events/{kafka,nats,rabbitmq,redis}`, `jobs/redis`, `middleware/service/bcrypt`, `storage/s3`, `pkg/otel`).
- Models embed `maniflex.BaseModel` and use `mfx:"..."` struct tags (e.g. `required`, `filterable`, `sortable`, `enum:a|b|c`) to declare behaviour.
- Register models before opening the DB — the adapter needs the registry to run migrations and resolve relations.
- Requests flow through a six-step pipeline (Auth, Deserialize, Validate, Service, DB, Response), extensible with `Before` / `After` / `Replace` middleware.

## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://docs.maniflex.dev/index): What maniflex is and the problem it solves.
- [Getting Started](https://docs.maniflex.dev/getting-started): Install, define a model, register it, and run your first API.
- [App Anatomy](https://docs.maniflex.dev/anatomy): The shape of a maniflex application and how the pieces fit together.
- [Example 1: Simple Blog](https://docs.maniflex.dev/example-1): End-to-end walkthrough of a minimal blog API.

## How It Works

- [Architecture](https://docs.maniflex.dev/how-it-works/architecture): The reflection-driven core, registry, and runtime derivation of routes.
- [Request Lifecycle](https://docs.maniflex.dev/how-it-works/lifecycle): How an HTTP request travels through the pipeline.

## Defining Your API

- [Models & BaseModel](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/models): Declaring entities and what `BaseModel` provides.
- [Field Tags Reference](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/tags): The full `mfx:` tag vocabulary for validation, filtering, and behaviour.
- [Relations](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/relations): `BelongsTo` / `HasMany` by convention, populated via `?include=`.
- [Soft Delete](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/soft-delete): Logical deletion and querying around it.
- [File Fields & Uploads](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/files): Handling file fields and multipart uploads.
- [Static Files](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/static-files): Serving static assets.
- [Localization](https://docs.maniflex.dev/defining-your-api/localization): Multi-language fields and responses.

## The Request Pipeline

- [Pipeline Overview](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/pipeline): The six-step Auth → Deserialize → Validate → Service → DB → Response flow.
- [ServerContext](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/context): The per-request context object passed through the pipeline.
- [Writing Middleware](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware): Composing behaviour with `Before` / `After` / `Replace`.
- [Transactions](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/transactions): Transactional request handling.
- [Error Handling](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/errors): Producing structured error responses.
- [Example 2: B2B SaaS API](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/example-2): A multi-tenant API walkthrough.

## Middleware Catalogue

- [Overview](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/index): The built-in middleware set.
- [Auth](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/auth): Authentication and authorization step.
- [Body](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/body): Request body deserialization.
- [Validate](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/validate): Field and rule validation.
- [Workflow](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/workflow): Workflow / state-machine middleware.
- [Service](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/service): Business-logic service step.
- [DB](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/db): Database persistence step.
- [Response](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/response): Response shaping and serialization.
- [OpenAPI](https://docs.maniflex.dev/the-request-pipeline/middleware-catalogue/openapi): OpenAPI spec contribution.

## Using the API

- [Querying](https://docs.maniflex.dev/using-the-api/querying): Filtering, sorting, keyset pagination, and field projection.
- [Searching](https://docs.maniflex.dev/using-the-api/searching): Full-text and field search.
- [Response Envelope](https://docs.maniflex.dev/using-the-api/responses): The shape of API responses.
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://docs.maniflex.dev/using-the-api/openapi): Generated OpenAPI 3.1 documentation.

## Deployment

- [Database Backends](https://docs.maniflex.dev/deployment/databases): PostgreSQL and pure-Go SQLite (no CGo).
- [Configuration](https://docs.maniflex.dev/deployment/config): Server `Config` options.
- [Graceful Shutdown](https://docs.maniflex.dev/deployment/shutdown): Clean shutdown handling.
- [Satellite Modules](https://docs.maniflex.dev/deployment/modules): The opt-in module ecosystem.
- [Admin Panel](https://docs.maniflex.dev/deployment/admin): The built-in admin UI.

## Advanced Topics

- [Custom Endpoints (Actions)](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/actions): Adding non-CRUD routes.
- [Raw Queries & Query Models](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/raw-queries): Dropping down to raw SQL.
- [Batch Operations & Sagas](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/batch-saga): Bulk writes and multi-step transactions.
- [Events & Background Jobs](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/events-jobs): The event bus and job runners.
- [Realtime / WebSockets](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/realtime): WebSocket and SSE support.
- [Encryption at Rest](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/encryption): Field-level encryption.
- [Versioning & History](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/versioning): Record history and versioning.
- [Scheduled Fields & Runner](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/scheduled): Time-based field execution.
- [Audit Logging](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/audit): Tracking changes.
- [Idempotency](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/idempotency): Safe request retries.
- [Outbound Integrations](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/integrations): Calling external systems.
- [CSV / XLSX Export](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/export): Exporting data.
- [Auth & Security Hardening](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/security): Securing a deployment.
- [PostgreSQL in Production](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/postgres): Production Postgres guidance.
- [Example 3: Order Processing System](https://docs.maniflex.dev/advanced-topics/example-3): A larger end-to-end example.

## Full Tutorial by Example

- [1. Overview & Scaffolding](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/1-scaffolding): Project setup.
- [2. Users & Auth](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/2-auth): Authentication.
- [3. Modeling Domain Entities & Relations](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/3-models): Domain modeling.
- [4. Validation & Business Rules](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/4-validation): Enforcing rules.
- [5. File Uploads](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/5-uploads): Handling uploads.
- [6. Filtering, Sorting & Pagination](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/6-querying): Query features.
- [7. Custom Endpoints & Actions](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/7-actions): Custom routes.
- [8. Events & Background Jobs](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/8-events-jobs): Async work.
- [9. Testing the API](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/9-testing): Test strategies.
- [10. Deploying to Production](https://docs.maniflex.dev/full-tutorial-by-example/10-deploy): Going live.

- [Glossary](https://docs.maniflex.dev/reference/glossary): Terminology used across the docs.
- [FAQ & Troubleshooting](https://docs.maniflex.dev/reference/faq): Common questions and fixes.
- [AI Agents](https://docs.maniflex.dev/reference/ai-agents): Guidance for AI agents working with maniflex.
